scripts.test:edge: node tests/edge/scam-engine.test.mjs && node tests/edge/screen-schema.test.mjs && node tests/edge/hardening-static.test.mjs && node tests/edge/data-lifecycle-diff.test.mjs && node tests/edge/authz-behavioral.test.mjs && node tests/edge/vnext-rls-audit.test.mjs && node tests/edge/unawaited-async-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/voice-mar-repeatback-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/rls-pool-saturation-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/postgis-retention-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/s3-lifecycle-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/fhir-staging-r1-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/device-auto-revoke-r7-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/post-erasure-injection-r6-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/rate-limit-r4-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/regulatory-escalation-r9-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/database-retention-r5-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/pgvector-embedding-s1-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/vital-threshold-s2-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/rate-limit-s3-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/auth-sharding-lag-s4-closure.test.mjs && node tests/edge/voice-stt-hijacking-s6-closure.test.mjs
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run validate:suite && corepack pnpm run test:edge && corepack pnpm run test:rls && corepack pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.typecheck:elder: corepack pnpm --dir apps/elder exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:grandchild: corepack pnpm --dir apps/grandchild exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:packages && corepack pnpm run typecheck:elder && corepack pnpm run typecheck:grandchild
scripts.test:e2e:browser:all: playwright test -c playwright.family.config.ts && playwright test -c playwright.iphone.config.ts
scripts.quality:check: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build:family
